positive: A minimalist, abstract rendition of a stylized mountain landscape at dawn. The foreground features clean, crisp silhouetted jagged peaks and gently rolling hills, designed for optimal print contrast. The sky is gradient, transitioning from deep indigo near the zenith to soft pastel peach and pale gold at the horizon. Use negative space artistically, ensuring clear separation between elements. The overall style should be a highly refined vector art aesthetic mixed with fine line engraving details. Composition must be perfectly centered and vertically balanced, optimized for t-shirt printing, with strong directional light emphasizing the clean edges and smooth curves. High contrast, graphic novel quality, poster design, crisp linework, volumetric lighting.
negative: blurry, artifact, low quality, noise, grainy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, text, signature, watermark, logo, copyright, messy, cluttered, low contrast, faded, washed out, deep shadows
